welcome.label: OUR STORY
welcome.title: Welcome to Alma Hotel
welcome.text: Located in the heart of Palermo, Alma Hotel was born from a passion for authentic Sicilian hospitality. Steps away from the city's main monuments, we offer a haven of elegance and comfort where every detail is crafted to make your stay unforgettable.
welcome.text2: Three refined room categories, breakfast included every morning, and a dedicated team ready to fulfil your every need. Because a trip to Palermo deserves to be experienced at its best.

rooms.title: Our Rooms
rooms.subtitle: Three categories of refined comfort in the heart of Palermo

matrimoniale.name: Double Room
matrimoniale.description: Elegant and comfortable, ideal for couples seeking classic comfort.

matrimonialeSuperiore.name: Superior Double Room
matrimonialeSuperiore.description: Spacious and refined, with premium amenities for a superior stay.

suite.name: Suite
suite.description: The ultimate boutique luxury: generous spaces, privileged views, exclusive services.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: A story of hospitality in the heart of Palermo
about.historyText: Alma Hotel was born in the historic centre of Palermo with a clear objective: to offer guests an authentic, refined, and welcoming stay experience. For years our family has passionately managed this boutique hotel, conveying the values of Sicilian hospitality.
about.historyText2: Each room was designed with care to combine modern comfort with classic Sicilian elegance. Our staff, present 24 hours a day, is always available to make your stay unforgettable.
